title: PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS - 211info
text: A FAMILY PLACE NEWBERG PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting skills classes that help caregivers connect with one another, offers evidence-based parenting strategies, and interactive time with children to directly apply learning. Most classes are 6-8 weeks long. Snacks and child care are included for in-person participants. Classes are available both online and in-person. 600 E 6th Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Parents, relatives, and caregivers of children ages 0-17 Hours: Varies by class Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-4020 Intake (971) 241-9258 Bilingual Enrollment Specialist Marisela Huizar Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at Edwards Elementary School in a detached building Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
